name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve ChaatBazaar
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📍 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment
- **Device:** [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 12]
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari]
- **Screen Size:** [e.g., 1920x1080, mobile]

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## ✅ Before You Submit
- [ ] I've checked if this issue already exists
- [ ] I've tested in multiple browsers
- [ ] I'm using the latest version from the main branch
- [ ] I've included relevant screenshots
